method: Rendered the rebuilt 23-page PDF with pdftoppm at 120 DPI after tightening bottleneck/non-sufficiency framing in the abstract, introduction, misalignment section, and discussion. Verified pdfinfo reports 23 letter pages and pdffonts reports no Type 3 fonts. Visually inspected the full-paper contact sheet plus changed pages 1, 2, 8, 10, 11, and 16 at full size. The claim-discipline table remains under the Discussion heading, and citations, figure labels, tables, and path references are legible with no clipping, overlap, blank page, duplicate URL, or alignment defects observed.
